---
title: "nice tables"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    keep_tex: true
---

```{r, echo = F, message = F, warning = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(xtable)
library(kableExtra)
```


# Table 1 

```{r, echo = F, results = 'asis'}
# load .csv file containing data frame of simulation scenario setting
sim_sets <- read.csv("./../simulation_series/data-generating-mechanism/sim_settings.csv") %>% 
  filter(npred < 17)

# load .RData file containing data frame of data generating parameters and sample size
set <- readRDS("./../simulation_series/data-generating-mechanism/set.RData")

# retrieve sample size for each scenario
sample_size <- c()

for (i in 1:18){
  sample_size[i] <- set[[i]][[4]]
}

sim_sets <- 
  sim_sets %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(
    sample_size = sample_size, 
    validation  = sample_size*10,
    sample_size = as.character(sample_size), 
    validation  = as.character(validation),
    dsig = c(rep(0.3, 18)),
    auc = c(rep(0.85, 18)),
    n   = recode(n, 
                 "0.5" = "0.5N", 
                  "1"   = "N", 
                  "2"   = "2N")
    ) %>%
  dplyr::select(X, npred, n, ef, sample_size, validation, dmu, dsig, auc) %>%
  rename(
    "Scenario"         = X,
    "Event Fraction"   = ef, 
    "No. Predictors"   = npred,
    "Sample Size"      = n,
    "$\\mathrm{n}_{\\mathrm{train}}$"      = sample_size,
    "$\\mathrm{n}_{\\mathrm{validation}}$" = validation, 
    "$\\delta_\\mu$"     = dmu,
    "$\\delta_\\Sigma$"  = dsig,
    "C"                  = auc) 

sim_sets %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = "\\addlinespace",
               caption = "Summary of simulation scenarios.", label = "tab:table") %>% 
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position") %>% 
  footnote(symbol =  "N is the minimum required sample size for the prediction model.")
```

\newpage

# Table 2 

```{r, echo = F}
Method <- c(
  "Random Undesampling", 
  "Random Oversampling",
  "Synthetic Majority Over Sampling",
  "SMOTE - Edited Nearest Neighbours"
  )

Abbreviation <- c("RUS","ROS", "SMOTE", "SENN")
Hyperparameters <- c( " ", " ", "$k=5$", "$k1=5$, $k2 = 3$")

Implementation <- c( 
  "ROSE \\cite{rose}", 
  "ROSE \\cite{rose}", 
  "IRIC \\cite{iric}", 
  "IRIC \\cite{iric}"
  )


comment <- list(pos = list(0), command = NULL)
comment$pos      <- list(4,4,4,4)
comment$command  <- c(paste0("\\hline\n",
                          "{\\footnotesize Note:}\n"), 
                     paste0("\\\\ {\\footnotesize * k: the number of nearest neighbors in implementation of SMOTE.}"), 
                     paste0("\\\\ {\\footnotesize * k1: the number of nearest neighbors in the SMOTE step of SMOTE-ENN.}"),
                     paste0("\\\\ {\\footnotesize * k2: the number of nearest neighbors in the ENN step of SMOTE-ENN}"))

cbind(Method, Abbreviation, Hyperparameters, Implementation)%>%
  as.data.frame()%>%
  rename("R Package" = "Implementation")%>% 
  kable(
    booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = "\\addlinespace",
    caption = "Summary of imbalance corrections implementation", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")%>%
  footnote(symbol =  c("\ \ \ \  $k$: the number of nearest neighbors in implementation of SMOTE.", 
                        "\ \ \ \ $k1$: the number of nearest neighbors in the SMOTE step of SMOTE-ENN.",
                        "\ \ \ \ $k2$: the number of nearest neighbors in the ENN step of SMOTE-ENN."), 
           symbol_manual = c("*", "*", "*"), escape = F)
```

\newpage

# Table 3 
```{r, echo = F}
Method <- c(
  "Logistic Regression",
  "Support Vector Machine",
  "Random Forest",
  "XGBoost",
  "RUSBoost",
  "EasyEnsemmble"
  )

Abbreviation <- c("LR", "SVM", "RF", "XG", "RB", "EE")
Hyperparameters <- c( " ", "tune grid = A", "tune grid = B", "tune grid = C", " ", " ")

Implementation <- c( 
  "base R \\cite{r}", 
  "caret \\cite{caret}", 
  "caret \\cite{caret}", 
  "caret \\cite{caret}",
  "ebmc \\cite{ebmc}",
  "IRIC \\cite{iric}"
  )

cbind(Method, Abbreviation, Hyperparameters, Implementation)%>%
  as.data.frame()%>%
  rename("R Package" = "Implementation")%>% 
  kable(
    booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = "\\addlinespace",
    caption = "Summary of classification algorithm implementation", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position") %>%
    footnote(symbol =  c("\ \ \ \ $A$: caret default grid", 
                         "\ \ \ \ $B$: mtry [1: all predictors], min.node.size [1:10], splitrule [gini]",
                         "\ \ \ \ $C$: caret default grid"), 
           symbol_manual = c("*", "*", "*"), escape = F)
```

\newpage 

# Appendix B Tables 
```{r, echo = F}
# corrections
cr <- readRDS("error_table_corrections.RDS")

# algorithms
lr <- readRDS("error_table_logistic_regression.RDS")
sv <- readRDS("error_table_support_vector_machine.RDS")
rf <- readRDS("error_table_random_forest.RDS")
xg <- readRDS("error_table_xgboost.RDS")
rb <- readRDS("error_table_rusboost.RDS")
ee <- readRDS("error_table_easy_ensemble.RDS")
```

```{r, echo = F}
cr %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: Imbalance Corrections", label = "tab:table") %>% 
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")

lr %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: Logistic Regression", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")

sv %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: Support Vector Machine", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")

rf %>%
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: Random Forest", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")

xg %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: XGBoost", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")

rb %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: RUSBoost", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")

ee %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T, escape = F, linesep = " ", caption = "Errors: EasyEnsemble", label = "tab:table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = F, latex_options ="hold_position")
```
